dashboard.label: PFCWD (Priority Flow Control Watchdog) Monitoring Dashboard - Bugged
dashboard.description: Reliable PFCWD monitoring with consistent increment detection

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status!="no_*" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort _time device_queue time_point | streamstats current=f last(storm_detected) as prev_storm, last(tx_drops) as prev_tx, last(rx_drops) as prev_rx by device_queue | eval storm_increment = if(isnull(prev_storm), 0, storm_detected - prev_storm) | eval tx_drop_increment = if(isnull(prev_tx), 0, tx_drops - prev_tx) | eval rx_drop_increment = if(isnull(prev_rx), 0, rx_drops - prev_rx) | where storm_increment > 0 OR tx_drop_increment > 0 OR rx_drop_increment > 0 | stats dc(device_queue) as queues_with_increments

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status!="no_*" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort _time device_queue time_point | streamstats current=f last(storm_detected) as prev_storm by device_queue | eval storm_increment = if(isnull(prev_storm), 0, storm_detected - prev_storm) | where storm_increment > 0 | stats sum(storm_increment) as total_new_storms

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" | stats count(eval(status="no_queue_data")) as headers_only, count(eval(status="no_pfcwd_data")) as no_data, count(eval(status!="no_*")) as active_queues | eval total = headers_only + no_data + active_queues | eval status_text = if(active_queues > 0, "Active (" + tostring(active_queues) + " queues)", if(headers_only > 0, "Headers Only", "No Data"))
index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status="stormed" | stats dc(eval(device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number)) as stormed_queues

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status="stormed" | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", latest(storm_detected) as "Total Storms", latest(storm_restored) as "Total Restored", latest(tx_drops) as "TX Drops", latest(rx_drops) as "RX Drops", latest(status) as "Current Status" by device_name, interface, queue_number | eval "Storm Balance" = 'Total Storms' - 'Total Restored' | eval "Queue ID" = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort - "Storm Balance", - "Last Seen" | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval "Alert Level" = "🚨 CRITICAL STORM" | table "Alert Level", "Queue ID", device_name, interface, queue_number, "Current Status", "Storm Balance", "Total Storms", "Total Restored", "TX Drops", "RX Drops", "Last Seen"

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status!="no_*" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort _time device_queue time_point | streamstats current=f last(storm_detected) as prev_storm, last(tx_drops) as prev_tx, last(rx_drops) as prev_rx by device_queue | eval storm_increment = if(isnull(prev_storm), 0, storm_detected - prev_storm) | eval tx_drop_increment = if(isnull(prev_tx), 0, tx_drops - prev_tx) | eval rx_drop_increment = if(isnull(prev_rx), 0, rx_drops - prev_rx) | where storm_increment >= 0 AND tx_drop_increment >= 0 AND rx_drop_increment >= 0 | timechart span=2m sum(storm_increment) as "Storm Detected", sum(tx_drop_increment) as "TX Drops", sum(rx_drop_increment) as "RX Drops"

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status!="no_*" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort _time device_queue time_point | streamstats current=f last(storm_detected) as prev_storm, last(tx_drops) as prev_tx, last(rx_drops) as prev_rx by device_queue | eval storm_increment = if(isnull(prev_storm), 0, storm_detected - prev_storm) | eval tx_drop_increment = if(isnull(prev_tx), 0, tx_drops - prev_tx) | eval rx_drop_increment = if(isnull(prev_rx), 0, rx_drops - prev_rx) | eval alert_type = case( storm_increment > 0 AND tx_drop_increment > 0 AND rx_drop_increment > 0, "All Types", storm_increment > 0 AND (tx_drop_increment > 0 OR rx_drop_increment > 0), "Storm + Drops", storm_increment > 0, "Storm Only", tx_drop_increment > 0 AND rx_drop_increment > 0, "TX + RX Drops", tx_drop_increment > 0, "TX Drops Only", rx_drop_increment > 0, "RX Drops Only", 1=1, "No Alerts") | where alert_type != "No Alerts" | stats count as "Incidents" by alert_type | sort - "Incidents"

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status!="no_*" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort _time device_queue time_point | streamstats current=f last(storm_detected) as prev_storm, last(storm_restored) as prev_restored by device_queue | eval storm_increment = if(isnull(prev_storm), 0, storm_detected - prev_storm) | eval restored_increment = if(isnull(prev_restored), 0, storm_restored - prev_restored) | where storm_increment > 0 | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", sum(storm_increment) as "New Storms", latest(storm_detected) as "Total Storms", latest(storm_restored) as "Total Restored", latest(status) as "Queue Status" by device_name, interface, queue_number | eval "Storm Balance" = 'Total Storms' - 'Total Restored' | sort - "New Storms" | head 20 | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status!="no_*" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort _time device_queue time_point | streamstats current=f last(tx_drops) as prev_tx, last(tx_ok) as prev_tx_ok by device_queue | eval tx_drop_increment = if(isnull(prev_tx), 0, tx_drops - prev_tx) | eval tx_ok_increment = if(isnull(prev_tx_ok), 0, tx_ok - prev_tx_ok) | where tx_drop_increment > 0 | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", sum(tx_drop_increment) as "New TX Drops", latest(tx_drops) as "Total TX Drops", latest(tx_ok) as "Total TX OK", latest(status) as "Queue Status" by device_name, interface, queue_number | eval "TX Drop Rate" = if('Total TX OK' + 'Total TX Drops' > 0, round(('Total TX Drops' / ('Total TX OK' + 'Total TX Drops')) * 100, 2) . "%", "N/A") | sort - "New TX Drops" | head 15 | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status!="no_*" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort _time device_queue time_point | streamstats current=f last(rx_drops) as prev_rx, last(rx_ok) as prev_rx_ok by device_queue | eval rx_drop_increment = if(isnull(prev_rx), 0, rx_drops - prev_rx) | eval rx_ok_increment = if(isnull(prev_rx_ok), 0, rx_ok - prev_rx_ok) | where rx_drop_increment > 0 | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", sum(rx_drop_increment) as "New RX Drops", latest(rx_drops) as "Total RX Drops", latest(rx_ok) as "Total RX OK", latest(status) as "Queue Status" by device_name, interface, queue_number | eval "RX Drop Rate" = if('Total RX OK' + 'Total RX Drops' > 0, round(('Total RX Drops' / ('Total RX OK' + 'Total RX Drops')) * 100, 2) . "%", "N/A") | sort - "New RX Drops" | head 15 | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status="no_*" | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", count as "Count", latest(message) as "Message" by device_name, status | eval "Status Description" = case( status="no_queue_data", "PFCWD headers found, no queue data", status="no_pfcwd_data", "No PFCWD commands found", status="no_crawler_log", "Crawler log missing", 1=1, status) | sort device_name, status | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

index=main analyzer_type="pfcwd" status!="no_*" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + interface + ":" + queue_number | sort _time device_queue time_point | table _time device_name interface queue_number status storm_detected tx_drops rx_drops time_point run_id | eval "_time" = strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | head 20
